reviews.comment:
Exelente limpieza y servicio .Me gustaría que se pueda usar la app YPF para canjear puntos .

(Translated by Google)
Excellent cleanliness and service. I wish the YPF app could be used to redeem points.

reviews.comment:
Es la única estación de servicio limpia de la ruta 23 , algo que no me agradó es que al medio día, no ofrecen nada para almorzar.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only clean gas station on Route 23, but something I didn't like is that at midday they don't offer anything for lunch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdElMU3BBRRAB

reviewer.displayName: Cris Feal de Cabañas Natanael Trevelin Chubut

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención de los playeros. Hay un restaurante para comer o tomar algo  y un motel.Recomiendo!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the beach staff. There's a restaurant for food and drinks, and a motel. Highly recommended!

reviews.comment:
Es la unica estacion de servicio sobre la ruta 23, tramo las grutas/ bariloche, no se puede quedar sin nafta....!!!!

(Translated by Google)
It's the only gas station on Route 23, between Las Grutas and Bariloche; you can't run out of gas...!!!!

reviews.comment:
En esta estación de servicio venden los mejores sándwiches de milanesa que comí.
Ahhh y tienen el mayorista más surtido de la ruta 23!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
This gas station sells the best milanesa sandwiches I've ever had.

Oh, and they have the best-stocked wholesaler on Route 23!
